content:
Do not add any new features yet.

The current preview/test build is broken.
In the preview I see a black screen / failed runtime state ("snapshot not found"), and the QR test on phone also fails.

Your task now is ONLY to diagnose and fix the preview/build/runtime issue.

Requirements:
1. Do not implement any new feature
2. Do not refactor unrelated code
3. Find the exact build/runtime error causing the preview to fail
4. Check:
   - app startup path
   - root layout
   - navigation setup
   - any import/export mismatch
   - any newly added component causing runtime failure
   - any broken TypeScript/Metro/Bundler/runtime issue
5. Restore the app to a runnable preview state
6. Confirm whether the current codebase builds/runs successfully after the fix

Return:
1. Exact root cause
2. Exact files changed
3. Whether the preview/runtime is now working again
4. Whether the QR test build is now usable
